svg.title: GradeOps Tribunal — Multi-Model Adversarial Grading Pipeline
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the full GradeOps pipeline: ingestion, multimodal grading, adversarial debate, plagiarism detection, and TA dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GradeOps ingest scanned exam PDFs?')
sendPrompt('What format does the rubric JSON use in GradeOps?')
sendPrompt('How does the PDF splitter and cropper work?')
sendPrompt('What is the Nougat model and how does it handle handwriting?')
sendPrompt('Why bypass OCR and feed raw images to the VLM?')
sendPrompt('How are OCR transcripts and raw images merged before grading?')
sendPrompt('What does the Grader Agent do in GradeOps?')
sendPrompt('What does the Critic Agent do and why use a fast model?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG retriever agent find similar past answers?')
sendPrompt('What does the Coordinator agent decide in GradeOps?')
sendPrompt('How does GradeOps visual plagiarism detection work with CLIP embeddings?')
sendPrompt('What gets saved to the GradeOps database after grading?')
sendPrompt('What features does the GradeOps TA dashboard have?')
sendPrompt('What does the final gradebook export look like?')
